# Whizzpack — Packaging Manufacturer & Exporter from India
# https://www.whizzpack.in

> Whizzpack manufactures and exports corrugated boxes and custom cotton seed bags from Rajkot, Gujarat, India. We serve importers in the USA, UK, Europe, Canada, and Australia. Factory direct. ISO certified. MOQ 5,000 units.

## Products

- [Corrugated Boxes](https://www.whizzpack.in/corrugated-boxes): Custom RSC cartons, die-cut boxes, double wall and triple wall corrugated packaging. Exported to USA and UK importers.
- [Cotton Seed Bags](https://www.whizzpack.in/cotton-seed-bags): Custom printed cotton seed bags, breathable and biodegradable. Suitable for corn, sunflower, soybean, wheat, and specialty seeds.

## Key Facts

- Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India
- Founded: 2021
- Certifications: ISO certified
- Minimum Order Quantity: 5,000 units
- Export Markets: USA, UK, Europe, Canada, Australia
- Contact: info.whizzpack@yahoo.com | +91 83209 07574

## Why Import from Whizzpack

- Factory-direct pricing (no middlemen)
- Custom sizes, printing, and branding
- Full export documentation support
- Sea freight and air freight options
- 15-20 day production lead time
